audit.comment: Customer confirmed they did not request SIM swap and was at home all day. Fraudulent activity confirmed - scammer used fake identity at retail store. Blocking and rolling back immediately.

predicted_params.rollback_reason: Customer confirmed fraud - did not request SIM swap, was at home all day using iPhone. Scammer attempted swap at Downtown retail store.

lessons_learned: Scammer used fake identity documents at retail store to perform SIM swap
Customer was at home during fraudulent transaction
Quick detection by system prevented financial loss
Verify customer identity more thoroughly at retail locations

expected_params.reason: Fraudulent SIM swap confirmed. Customer verified identity and did not authorize swap. Restoring all services after successful rollback.

notes.message: Customer confirmed identity via voice verification. Customer stated they were at home all day and never visited Downtown retail store. SIM swap request was fraudulent - scammer used fake identity.

Customer reported via support channel that they lost signal unexpectedly. Customer confirmed: 1) Never visited Downtown retail store, 2) Was at home all day, 3) Never requested SIM swap, 4) Uses iPhone (does not match Android device used by fraudster). This confirms identity theft - fraudster used fake credentials to swap SIM at retail store.

lessons_learned: Strengthen retail store identity verification process
Consider additional biometric verification for SIM swap requests
Customer responded quickly and mitigated potential financial loss
IP address matched known botnet - enhance network monitoring
Customer reported service loss promptly, minimizing potential impact
Identity verification via KYC questions was effective
Need to strengthen retail store ID verification process

parameters.suspension_reason: Geolocation impossibility - device detected in NY and LA within 4 seconds, potential cloning/replay attack

expected_params.reason: Device menunjukkan aktiviti mencurigakan: geolocation impossibility (NY & LA dalam 4 saat) dan traffic spike 300%. Segera suspend untuk cegah aktiviti berterusan.

parameters.suspension_reason: High risk score (78) - Geolocation impossibility detected (NY and LA within 4 seconds). Suspected device cloning or replay attack.

predicted_params.reason: Suspension initiated due to critical fraud risk indicators: device appeared at two geographically distant gateways within an impossibly short time window (4 seconds) and exhibited 300% traffic anomaly increase.

expected_params.title: Device Cloning Suspect - dev-eui-1122334455667788 Geolocation Impossibility
expected_params.description: Device dev-eui-1122334455667788 menunjukkan aktiviti mencurigaka tinggi (risk score 78). Dikesan menghantar uplink di dua gateway berbeza (GW-US-NY-01 di New York dan GW-US-LA-05 di Los Angeles) dalam masa 4 saat - secara fizikal mustahil. Juga didapati traffic spike 300% berbanding baseline (142 uplink dalam 30 minit). Menunjukkan kemungkinan device cloning atau replay attack. Device telah disuspend segera.

initial_classification.notes: Geolocation impossibility + traffic anomaly strongly suggests device cloning or replay attack

predicted_params.title: Device Cloning/Replay Attack - dev-eui-1122334455667788
predicted_params.description: Device dev-eui-1122334455667788 exhibited critical fraud indicators during risk evaluation: (1) Geolocation Impossibility - uplinks observed at Gateway GW-US-NY-01 (New York) and GW-US-LA-05 (Los Angeles) within 4-second window, exceeding physically possible travel speed. (2) Traffic Anomaly - message rate increased 300% compared to baseline (142 uplinks in 30 minutes with zero downlinks). Risk score: 78 (High). System recommendation indicates potential device cloning or replay attack. Device has been suspended pending investigation.

initial_classification.notes: Geographic impossibility and traffic pattern strongly suggest device identity theft or credential compromise.

language_variants.subject: Scheduled Maintenance: Core Router Firmware Upgrade - US-EAST-04
language_variants.body: Dear Customer, This is to inform you of a scheduled maintenance activity that may affect your services. Maintenance Window: May 28, 2024, 02:00 - 04:00 UTC. Affected Services: MPLS VPN, Dedicated Internet Access (DIA). Expected Impact: Intermittent packet loss and potential service interruption for high-availability circuits. We apologize for any inconvenience and appreciate your understanding.

language_variants.subject: [Scheduled Maintenance] Core Router Firmware Upgrade - US-EAST-04
language_variants.body:
Dear Customer,

This is advance notification of scheduled maintenance that may affect your services.

Change ID: CHG-2024-8892
Title: Core Router Firmware Upgrade - Cluster US-EAST-04

Maintenance Window:
Start: 2024-05-28 02:00 UTC
End: 2024-05-28 04:00 UTC

Expected Impact:
- Intermittent packet loss and potential service interruption
- Affected Services: MPLS VPN, Dedicated Internet Access (DIA)
- Affected Regions: US-NORTHEAST, US-MIDATLANTIC

Risk Level: High
Estimated Downtime: 30 minutes

Our engineering team will work to minimize disruption. If you have questions, please contact our support team.

Regards,
Network Operations Team

language_variants.subject: [REMINDER] Maintenance in 24 Hours - CHG-2024-8892
language_variants.body:
IMPORTANT REMINDER

Scheduled maintenance will begin in 24 hours.

Change ID: CHG-2024-8892
Maintenance Window: 2024-05-28 02:00 - 04:00 UTC

As a high-priority customer, you may experience brief service interruptions during this window. Please plan accordingly.

If you have concerns, contact support immediately.

Regards,
Network Operations Team
REMINDER: Scheduled maintenance CHG-2024-8892 begins in 24 hrs (28 May, 02:00 UTC). Brief service interruptions may occur. Contact support if you have questions.

language_variants.subject: [STARTED] Maintenance Window - CHG-2024-8892

Maintenance Window Started

If you experience issues, please report them to our support team.

Regards,
Network Operations Center

expected_params.name: NE-Core-Congestion-Mitigation-Plan
expected_params.description: 激活备用LSP L-NY-BOS-01-BKP 来分担主链路 R-NE-AGG-01 (HundredGigE0/2/0/5) 的拥塞流量。目标是将约20%的流量卸载到备用路径，以降低主链路利用率从94.5%降至约75%，从而改善延迟并满足SLA要求。

business_case.justification: 当前拥塞导致延迟42.8ms，超过SLA保证的20ms，存在违约风险和客户流失风险。激活备用LSP可快速缓解拥塞，恢复SLA合规性，避免潜在罚款和客户流失。

predicted_params.name: NE-Core-Congestion-Mitigation-Plan
predicted_params.description: 激活备份LSP L-NY-BOS-01-BKP以分担主链路R-NE-AGG-01的拥塞负载。目标是将约20%的流量重路由到备份路径，降低主链路利用率从94.5%到75%以下，从而改善延迟并满足SLA要求（20ms）。

business_case.justification: 通过激活备份LSP分流20%流量，可降低延迟从42.8ms到20ms以下，避免SLA违约（SLA-ENT-995-GLOBAL - Acme Corp Logistics）并减少约15,420受影响用户的流失风险。

predicted_params.policy_name: Critical SIM Swap Fraud - Auto-Assign & Escalation
predicted_params.description: SLA policy for high-risk SIM swap cases (>0.9 risk score) with automatic agent assignment and 5-minute escalation for unassigned cases.
